title: luzula spicata var. glomerata
intro: Luzula spicata var. glomerata, commonly known as cluster-fruited woodrush or clustered woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luzula spicata var. glomerata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems.
